title: Trimming Shop 20cm x 17cm x 2cm Wooden Merry Christmas Hanging Sign, Rustic Silver Plaque with Reindeer Cut-Out, Snowflakes and Silver Glitter Star Ornaments, Xmas Decorations, Pack of 1
features: 𝐀𝐝𝐝 𝐑𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐇𝐨𝐦𝐞: Celebrate Christmas with Trimming Shop’s 20cm x 17cm x 2cm Wooden Merry Christmas Hanging Sign, a rustic silver plaque designed to spread festive joy. Featuring “Merry Christmas” engraved in warm brown lettering with snowflake motifs, the design also includes a cut-out reindeer scene with pine trees, snowflakes, and a heart, bringing a timeless seasonal touch.

𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐏𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐰𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Expertly crafted from premium pinewood, this wooden Merry Christmas plaque is lightweight yet sturdy, making it suitable for repeated use year after year. With a solid 5mm thickness and natural wood finish, it offers nature-friendly durability for both indoor and outdoor Christmas décor.

𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐆𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐀𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬: The sign is beautifully decorated with dangling snowflake ornaments and a silver glitter star, suspended by twine and accented with natural wood beads. A sparkling silver star on the hanging cord adds extra charm, making this Christmas wall sign a standout decoration.

𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐔𝐬𝐞: Perfect for displaying on doors, windows, walls, mantels, or shop displays, this Christmas hanging plaque enhances homes, offices, and party venues alike. Its rustic farmhouse style complements both traditional and modern holiday themes.

𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐄𝐱𝐭𝐫𝐚 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞: Available in a pack of 1 or 2, these wooden Christmas signs provide versatile decorating options for multiple spaces. A reusable holiday wall plaque, it brings festive warmth and cheer year after year.
description: Product Description Transform your holiday decor with our beautifully crafted Christmas Wooden Hanging Sign! This festive sign is designed to spread holiday cheer and bring a warm, rustic touch to your home. Perfect for doorways, walls, or as a thoughtful gift for loved ones! Durable Wood Made from high-quality, wood, ensuring longevity and a beautiful finish Ready to Display Includes a sturdy twine for easy hanging, making it a breeze to adorn your home. Perfect Holiday Gift A thoughtful gift for friends and family that brings joy and holiday spirit to any hom Create Lasting Memories A delightful addition to your holiday traditions, this sign will be cherished for years to come.
